data.title: Advanced Drainage Systems Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Results Conference Call and 2026 Investor Day
data.description: In Hilliard, Ohio, Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS) disclosed its plan to unveil unaudited financial data for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year concluded on March 31, 2026, prior to the market opening on May 21, 2026. ADS is a prominent producer of stormwater and onsite wastewater management products for various sectors, such as commercial, residential, infrastructure, and agriculture.

data.title: CAVA Announces the Retirement of Karen Kochevar from the Board
data.description: In Washington, Karen Kochevar has announced her retirement from the Board of Directors after serving for a decade. She will not seek re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting, concluding her tenure which saw the Company's transformation from a privately held to a publicly traded entity. This decision aligns with the Board's succession planning and signifies the end of Ms. Kochevar's ten-year board service.

data.title: Rocky Brands, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on April 28, 2026
data.description: Rocky Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: RCKY) from Nelsonville, Ohio, is set to reveal its Q1 ended March 31, 2026, financial results on April 28, 2026, post-market closure. The company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET for discussing these results. To join the call, interested investors and analysts can dial (877) 704-4453 (domestic) or (201) 389-0920 (international).

data.title: 2026 Long Drive Rebate: New Rebate from Hankook Tire Offers Up to $100 Savings
data.description: Hankook Tire, a leading global tire maker, has introduced new rebate offers on a range of popular tires including those designed for SUVs, light trucks, electric vehicles, and performance vehicles tailored for long drives. The promotion aims to provide savings to drivers transitioning into the warmer weather season. The announcement was made in Nashville, Tennessee on April 21, 2026. This promotional offer is set to benefit a wide range of drivers looking to upgrade their tires, with potential savings on high-quality and specialized Hankook tires.

data.title: Dignity Health Champions Sustainability Across California
data.description: Glendale, California - On April 21, 2026, Dignity Health, part of CommonSpirit Health, is intensifying sustainability efforts in California by minimizing waste, enhancing recycling programs, and endorsing environmental projects in the community. The hospitals are dedicated to reducing their environmental footprint and have successfully implemented measures to achieve this goal. This initiative is crucial in ensuring a healthier environment for all, with a focus on responsible waste management.

data.title: Target Hospitality Announces Launch of Secondary Offering
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Target Hospitality Corp. (Nasdaq: TH), a leading provider of modular accommodations and hospitality services in North America, unveiled a new initiative in The Woodlands, Texas. The company is known for its vertically-integrated approach and is recognized as one of the largest in its sector.

data.title: Horizon Technology Finance to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Horizon Technology Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: HRZN) disclosed its intention to unveil financial outcomes for Q1 which concluded on March 31, 2026, on May 5, 2026, post-market closure. The Company, linked with Monroe Capital, plans to hold a conference call to deliberate on the results on May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. During the conference call, Mike Balkin, Chief Executive Officer, is expected to deliver comments.

data.title: Triumph Releases First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: A company based in Dallas, TFIN, has recently disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Interested parties can access detailed information, including the shareholder letter, regarding the 1Q 2026 results at ir.triumph.io.

data.title: Perimeter Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in Clayton, Missouri, Perimeter Solutions, a key provider of industrial products and services aiding critical missions, revealed its plans for releasing its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 6, 2026, before the market opens. Perimeter Solutions trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol PRM.

data.title: Miata Metals Announces Listing on the TSX Venture Exchange
data.description: Miata Metals Corp., a company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has shared exciting news on April 21, 2026. They announced that starting April 23, 2026, their common shares will be listed and available for trading on the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV) using the symbol MMET. Miata Metals Corp.'s common shares are currently trading under the tickers CSE: MMET, FSE: 8NQ, and OTCQX: MMETF. This move will provide investors with an opportunity to engage with the company in a more accessible manner.

data.title: American Public Education, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call and Announces Upcoming Conference Participation
data.description: In Charles Town, West Virginia, on April 21, 2026, American Public Education, Inc. announced that they have approximately 109,000 students enrolled in their online and campus-based postsecondary education programs. The Company, listed on Nasdaq as APEI, is focused on transforming lives, advancing careers, and bettering communities through their educational offerings.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces that on May 5, 2026, the Company Plans to Issue Its First Quarter 2026 Results and Have a Conference Call
data.description: In Monaco, on April 21, 2026, Scorpio Tankers Inc. revealed plans to release its first quarter 2026 earnings report on May 5, 2026. The company, trading as STNG on NYSE, will issue the press release in the morning (Eastern Daylight Time) and conduct a conference call at 9:00 AM EDT and 3:00 PM CEST on the same day.

data.title: Inhibrx Provides Clinical Update on Ozekibart (INBRX-109) in Late Line Colorectal Cancer
data.description: San Diego-based Inhibrx Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: INBX), a company specializing in developing innovative biologic therapies, released new interim data on April 21, 2026. The data comes from the Phase 1/2 study they are conducting, indicating significant progress in their clinical-stage biopharmaceutical projects.

data.title: Resideo To Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 12, 2026
data.description: Resideo Technologies, Inc., a prominent company in the technology-driven sensing and controls industry for residential and commercial markets, is set to unveil its first-quarter results for 2026. The corporation, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol REZI, will announce the financial performance on April 21, 2026, from Scottsdale, Arizona. Resideo Technologies is recognized worldwide for its innovative products and solutions, catering to various sectors with cutting-edge technology. Stay tuned for detailed insights and figures from their Q1 2026 disclosure.

data.title: Jazz Pharmaceuticals to Present Data at ASCO 2026 Highlighting Advancements for Ziihera® (zanidatamab-hrii) in Gastroesophageal Adenocarcinoma and Zepzelca® (lurbinectedin)
data.description: A swift verbal report was delivered regarding the PD-L1 subgroup data from the HERIZON-GEA-01 study, focusing on the assessment of zanidatamab combinations. Alongside, further examinations were conducted on tolerability, biomarker response, and real-world treatment patterns in HER2+ GEA patients. This information was specifically shared with U.S. media and investors. The presentation took place in Dublin on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Carvana Posts Amid Amazing Profit Growth, Earns Rating Upgrade
data.description: Carvana's Relative Strength Rating has surpassed 80, indicating strong performance. The company has experienced impressive profit growth, resulting in a rating upgrade. These developments were highlighted in a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Coupang will reveal Q1 2026 results on May 5, 2026.
data.description: The recent report reveals that approximately 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 were confirmed in the country today, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 50,000. Additionally, the number of deaths related to the virus has risen to 700, with over 20,000 individuals having recovered from the disease so far. Authorities have implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and limitations on social gatherings. The healthcare system is reportedly overwhelmed, with hospitals operating at almost full capacity. Efforts are being made to increase testing capacity and provide adequate care to those affected by the pandemic.
